note: Module 4 — where each country is actually credible in the value chain, referenced to Singapore as the front-end anchor. Status is credible / emerging / absent (a descriptive read of public evidence, not a score). Each cell carries a quality tag.

status_legend.credible: Established, multi-firm activity a customer could rely on today.

layers.reference: Regional anchor is Singapore (GF, Micron, VIS–NXP). None confirmed in the five.

Malaysia.note: No confirmed commercial 300mm fab; investment-promotion stage.

Vietnam.note: No confirmed 300mm fab; front-end supply chain limited.

Thailand.note: No confirmed 300mm fab; front-end at planning stage.

Malaysia.note: Mature OSAT; ~13% of global packaging/assembly/test activity (share, not physical capacity). Advanced packaging is nascent, not credible yet — national target is only ~7% of global advanced packaging by 2035.

Vietnam.note: Amkor, Intel back-end; FDI-driven and growing.

Thailand.note: Back-end and power-component manufacturing (Infineon); HDD/PCB base.

Philippines.note: Veteran ATP base; 73% SMS / 27% EMS (OECD, note year).

Malaysia.note: Penang design push; extending from back-end.

Thailand.note: Limited; do not label Analog Devices as local design (per revised appendix).

Malaysia.note: Back-end consumables/equipment co-located in Penang; front-end specialty materials imported.

Vietnam.note: Some back-end material/equipment via FDI; front-end largely absent. Supplier count needs named list.

Thailand.note: Deep PCB/power material base; front-end wafer materials not established.

Indonesia.note: Electronic-grade processing not yet formed; silica-downstreaming is a roadmap.

layers.reference: Downstream pull that anchors back-end and support.

Malaysia.note: Broad E&E base + Johor data-center cluster.

layers.reference: Direction and incentives — a driver where it changes economics, a signal where it does not.

Malaysia.note: National Semiconductor Strategy; target 60,000 talent by 2030 (policy target).

Vietnam.note: National semiconductor talent target ~50,000 by 2030; STEM scaling.

Thailand.note: Government 5-year plan, semiconductor target ~80,000; EEC incentives.

Indonesia.note: SKKNI standards; ARM×Danantara talent program (design/talent signal).
